title: Monday expert support in CRM setup for small business

posts.author: JulianT (Julian Townley)
posts.cookedHtml:
We are a small video production company looking for a Monday.com specialist to help us.

As a starting point we’re needing assistance in CRM structuring and sales pipeline management. Ideally we’re looking a consultant based in Australia / Sydney and able to provide hourly based fee structure.

posts.author: aquibk (Aquib Zafar)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Julian,

We are a certified monday professionals, would love to hear more about your use case and demo you some amazing workflows that we have. My team is based is based in Sydney as well so let us connect and discuss it further.

Feel free to reach out at aquibcs@outlook.com

Best Regards,
Aquib Zafar

posts.author: Alex.Robinson (Alex Robinson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @JulianT, Welcome to the community

my name is Alex Robinson from upstream, we are a monday.com partner based out of Canberra Australia and are able to provide our services relating to CRM and Sales Management.
Can travel to Sydney too if required, but you will be surprised how much I can assist you remotely.

Happy to connect and provide further information and see if working together is a great fit for your organisation.

reach out to me alex@upstreamtech.io if you would like to arrange a meeting.

Appreciated your time.

Thank you

posts.author: DamcoSolutions ( Neelam Bhatt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Julian T

Choosing monday .com for managing your sales pipeline is a worthy decision! By using sales structuring templates, you can connect multiple tools, manage customer needs and communications, and monitor sales teams’ processes effectively. The template simplifies sales workflow and offers interactive visualization of where all deals stand. You can also understand which tasks your team is working on, completed, or jammed. Similarly, you can insert the “Numbers Column” option in this template to track revenue, costs, time estimations, and others.

If you’re seeking assistance in implementing a sales pipeline template, hiring dedicated experts from a recognized monday.com consulting company is a preferable option. They can integrate your favorite tools and make the sales template easily sync with team members at any stage.
